source: Traps and Devilry (d12) — MÖRK BORG Bare Bones Edition, p.4. Entry names are canonical; trigger/effect/DR mechanics are GM-facing elaborations (the source lists names only).

entries.name: Well-dressed corpse, booby-trapped
entries.effect: Agl dr12 or d8 damage as the rigged mechanism springs.

entries.name: Wall-holes shooting poisonous arrows
entries.effect: Agl dr14 or d6 damage + Tou dr12 or poisoned (-2 next test).

entries.name: Bells and marbles on the floor
entries.effect: Alerts everyone in the dungeon. No save.

entries.name: Scorpion-filled basket poised to fall
entries.effect: Agl dr12 or d4 damage + a scorpion sting per round until brushed off.

entries.name: Fish hooks hanging at eye level
entries.effect: Pre dr10 to spot. Otherwise d2 damage and -1 Pre tests until removed.

entries.name: Chest marked with explosive runes
entries.effect: All within 10ft take d8 damage; Agl dr12 for half.

entries.name: Lock trapped with vial of poison gas
entries.effect: Tou dr12 or -d6 hp and incapacitated 1 minute.

entries.name: Jewel removal leads to roof collapse
Slanted floor, translucent oil, pit
entries.effect: Agl dr14 or slide into a d4×10 ft pit (1d6 per 10ft).

entries.name: Snake-cages on collapsing ceiling tiles
entries.effect: Agl dr12 or d4 snakes drop. Each bite: d4 + Tou dr10 or poisoned.

entries.name: Evil urns release cold ghosts
entries.effect: Pre dr14 to ward off; otherwise -1 Str and Tou for the rest of the day.

entries.name: Coins coated in grime and poison
entries.effect: Tou dr10 or -d4 hp and weakened (next test +2 dr).
